Bash(export PATH="$PATH:/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI" && gh issue create --repo joegooderham/ai-trader-bot --title "BACKLOG-002: SQLite market data storage" --body "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Description
Replace JSON storage with SQLite. Store all candle history locally so we never re-fetch data we already have.

## Requirements
- Migrate `data/storage.py` from JSON to SQLite
- Store all candle history locally
- Required for LSTM training later \(BACKLOG-007\)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] SQLite database created and managed in `data/`
- [ ] All candle data persisted across restarts
- [ ] Trade history migrated from JSON to SQLite
- [ ] No duplicate data fetches for already-stored candles
EOF
\)")

Redistribute LSTM's 50pts to working indicators. LSTM currently returns 0 so bot trades on half a score.

- MACD/RSI: 35 \(was 20\)
- EMA: 25 \(was 15\)
- Bollinger: 20 \(was 10\)
- Volume: 15 \(was 5\)
- MCP: 5 \(new\)

## Files to Change
- `bot/engine/confidence.py`
- `config/config.yaml`
- `bot/config.py`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Weights sum to 100
- [ ] Confidence scores reflect full range \(0-100\)
- [ ] No LSTM placeholder returning 0
EOF
\)")

Bash(export PATH="$PATH:/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI" && gh issue create --repo joegooderham/ai-trader-bot --title "BACKLOG-006: Dashboard" --body "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Description
React 4th Docker container with full dashboard capabilities.

## Requirements
- **Infrastructure**: Cloudflare Tunnel \(public access\), Cloudflare Access \(email gate\), Google OAuth \(account gate\), Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA, secret PIN layer
- **Features**: Live positions & P&L, trade history & charts, bot health status, performance stats, config controls, risk sliders

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] React app running as 4th Docker container
- [ ] Cloudflare Tunnel configured for public access
- [ ] Multi-layer auth: Cloudflare Access → Google OAuth → Turnstile → PIN
- [ ] Live position and P&L display
- [ ] Trade history with charts
- [ ] Bot health status visible
- [ ] Performance stats dashboard
- [ ] Config controls and risk sliders functional
EOF
\)")

Phase 2 ML model trained on SQLite candle data. Reclaim the 50pts in confidence scoring currently returning zero.

## Requirements
- Train LSTM on historical candle data from SQLite
- Integrate predictions into confidence scoring
- Restore 50pt LSTM weight in confidence engine

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] LSTM model trained on local candle history
- [ ] Model predictions feed into confidence scoring
- [ ] 50pt weight produces meaningful scores \(not zero\)
EOF
\)")

Bash(export PATH="$PATH:/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI" && git add broker/ig_client.py && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(broker\): add yfinance as fallback candle data source

- Bot now falls back to Yahoo Finance when IG returns 403 or any error
- yfinance is free, no API key needed, no rate limits
- Added ticker mapping \(EUR_USD -> EURUSD=X\), interval mapping, and period limits
- Normalises yfinance output to match IG candle format \(lowercase OHLCV, UTC index\)
- Fallback applies to both full fetches and cache top-ups
- Trade-off: ~15 min delay on yfinance data, but keeps bot scanning when IG is down
- Ref: BACKLOG-001

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push -u origin feature/yfinance-fallback && gh pr create --head feature/yfinance-fallback --base develop --title "BACKLOG-001: Add yfinance fallback for candle data" --body "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Adds Yahoo Finance as a secondary candle data source in `broker/ig_client.py`
- Bot automatically falls back to yfinance when IG API returns 403 or fails
- Zero cost, no API key, no rate limits
- Candle format normalised to match existing IG output \(lowercase OHLCV, UTC datetime index\)

## Changes
- `broker/ig_client.py`: Added `YFINANCE_TICKERS`, `YFINANCE_INTERVALS`, `YFINANCE_PERIOD_MAP` mappings
- `broker/ig_client.py`: Added `_fetch_candles_with_fallback\(\)` and `_fetch_candles_from_yfinance\(\)` methods
- `broker/ig_client.py`: `get_candles\(\)` now routes through fallback wrapper

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify IG candle fetch still works as primary source
- [ ] Simulate IG 403 and confirm yfinance fallback activates
- [ ] Confirm candle DataFrame format matches \(columns: open, high, low, close, volume\)
- [ ] Verify indicators calculate correctly on yfinance data
- [ ] Check logs show fallback warning when triggered

Closes #3

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")

feat\(observability\): add yfinance fallback monitoring and test endpoint

- MCP endpoint: GET /test-fallback verifies yfinance for all pairs on demand

EOF
\)" && git push -u origin feature/yfinance-fallback-observability && gh pr create --head feature/yfinance-fallback-observability --base develop --title "BACKLOG-001: Add yfinance fallback monitoring \(Telegram + MCP endpoint\)" --body "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- **Telegram alert**: Bot sends a notification whenever it falls back from IG to yfinance, so you know in real-time
- **MCP test endpoint**: `GET /test-fallback` lets you verify yfinance is healthy for all 5 pairs on demand
- **Wiring**: `set_notifier\(\)` on IGClient avoids circular imports — scheduler connects them after init

## Changes
- `broker/ig_client.py`: Added `set_notifier\(\)`, `_notifier` field, Telegram alert in fallback path
- `notifications/telegram_bot.py`: Added `data_source_fallback\(\)` message method
- `mcp_server/server.py`: Added `GET /test-fallback` endpoint
- `bot/scheduler.py`: Wired `broker.set_notifier\(notifier\)` after init

## Test plan
- [ ] Docker build succeeds
- [ ] `GET /test-fallback` returns candle data for all 5 pairs
- [ ] Simulate IG failure and confirm Telegram alert fires
- [ ] Normal IG flow still works without sending fallback alerts

Closes #3

- `bot/scheduler.py` — IGClient import/init
- `notifications/telegram_chat.py` — IGClient import/init

- `bot/instance.py` — comment fix
- `config/config.yaml` — comment fix
- `.env.example` — IG credentials template
- `CLAUDE.md` — updated migration note
